content.en:
Holy Monument!

This is not an ordinary Dao monument, but an original antiquity, which seems to be a monument, but it is actually an extremely powerful original antiquity.

They had not seen such an original artifact as the Holy Dao Monument, but they had heard of its legends.

The strength of the Primordial Antiquities Sacred Dao Monument is very strong, comparable to the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, but it is not an ordinary Eightfold Primordial Ancestor.

These half-step eightfold ancestors had no way to compare with the Holy Dao Monument at all, and the breath of the Holy Dao Monument could crush them.

However, the Holy Dao Monument is another great opportunity.

The area where the Holy Dao Monument was born will form a special Dao Domain, and the core area is even enough to produce unimaginable benefits to the half-step Eightfold Ancestor, if you have been practicing there, you have a chance to comprehend the Yuan Dao of the Perfection Realm to the extreme realm.

Even if you practice in the marginal area, you can also improve the realm of the Yuan Dao.

It is precisely because the effect of the Holy Dao Monument is too rebellious that many forces want to snatch the Holy Dao Monument.

As for killing the Holy Dao Monument, they didn't have such an idea.

Killing a Holy Dao Monument comparable to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor level, many top Eightfold Origin Ancestors can still do it, but once they kill the Sacred Dao Monument, the effect of the Sacred Dao Monument drops significantly.

Therefore, many strong people or forces want to imprison the Holy Dao Monument and use it as the hole card of their own forces.

It's a pity that the arrest and confinement have failed again and again.

However, in the beginning, many powerhouses would not kill the Holy Dao Monument, but would only use the Holy Dao Monument to cultivate a half-step Eightfold Ancestor, and each time they would be able to give birth to a few Half-Step Eightfold Origin Ancestors who had comprehended the Extreme Yuan Dao, and they would soon be promoted to Eightfold Ancestor.

And before the Holy Dao Monument is leaving, those Eightfold Origin Ancestors will most likely make a move and kill the Holy Dao Monument, even if after killing, the effect of the Holy Dao Monument's body will drop significantly, but it will also be useful!

Of course.

The strength of the Holy Dao Monument is not weak, and it is not able to succeed every time, and the strength level of each Holy Dao Monument is uneven.

The strength of some of the Holy Dao Monuments was very terrifying, and there were even incidents of the fall of the Eightfold Ancestor.

Last time, there was a Holy Dao Monument in a certain regional boundary, a great war broke out, dozens of community boundaries were destroyed, and an Eightfold Ancestor was lost.

Of course, in the end, the Holy Dao Monument fell.

"Holy Ape Dao Ancestor, is this news accurate?"

The palace master of Hanhai Palace, the Dark Soul Dao Ancestor, was slightly surprised, his eyes were a little surprised, but he was also a little worried.

The Holy Ape Dao Ancestor said in a very affirmative tone: "Naturally, it is true, it is difficult to spy on the traces of the Holy Dao Monument, it is difficult to say, it is not difficult to say that it is not difficult. We used a fragment of the Holy Dao Tablet and a special Primordial Ancient Treasure to determine that an Primordial Antiquity Saint Dao Tablet would appear at the boundary of the Hanhai Region, but the specific location could not be locked yet. "

Immediately, the Holy Ape Dao Ancestor said again: "The appearance of the Holy Dao Monument this time is also an opportunity for you, I will send you to enter the vicinity of the Holy Dao Monument to comprehend, if you are lucky, maybe you can comprehend the Extreme Yuan Dao." However, as soon as the time comes, I will inform you to leave, otherwise if a big war breaks out, with your strength, I am afraid that it will be affected. When the time comes, I won't be able to protect you. "

"Thank you, Holy Ape Dao Ancestor!"

Several half-step Yae Origin Ancestors thanked one after another.

Immediately, Hanhai Palace was also preparing, once the Holy Dao Monument appeared, they would organize a large number of Dao Ancestors to go to the Enlightenment.

In addition, they also had to prepare for the outbreak of a big war in the entire Hanhai region, and how to avoid losses was also a scope they needed to consider.

After all, the battle of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor was too terrifying, and with a wave of his hand, he could destroy a small community boundary.

......

Soon, almost all the other big forces in the Hanhai region also got the news.

Although the background of other great forces is not as good as that of Hanhai Palace, they have all gone out of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestors, even if those Eightfold Primordial Ancestors feel that there is no hope of snatching the Holy Dao Monument and do not participate in it, they will pass on the news!

Strictly speaking, the Holy Dao Monument is only useful to the Dao Ancestors under the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and it is useless to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

However, he was too helpful to one force, so the Eightfold Origin Ancestor of many forces wanted to snatch the Holy Dao Monument, and no matter how bad it was, he had to kill the Holy Dao Monument and snatch the body.

In some powerful regional boundaries, the fragments of the Holy Dao Monument are of high value and can be exchanged for a lot of resources.

......

Xuanyu Pavilion.

Ye Tian received a message from Xuanhuang Daozu, so he immediately went to the void where Xuanhuang Daozu was located and met Xuanhuang Daozu.

"I've seen the Xuanhuang Pavilion Master!"

After Ye Tian saw Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor, he said respectfully.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, I called you here this time because I have a good thing to tell you!" Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor said very seriously.

"Good thing?"

Ye Tian listened with pricked ears.

Immediately, Xuanhuang Daozu mentioned the Holy Dao Monument and talked about the Holy Dao Monument.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, now that the news of the Holy Dao Monument has spread among the major forces, the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor and the Half-Step Eightfold Ancestor of the major forces have all known the news, and the Half-Step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor is still unclear. The birth of the Holy Dao Monument is a coincidence, but it is also a trouble. However, we just need to be careful, and there is no big danger. When the time comes, you can hide in the headquarters of the Xuanyu Pavilion, even if it is the battle of the Eightfold Ancestor, it will be difficult to affect there. "

"This time, the Holy Dao Monument was born, although the Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Yuan Dao can enter the Dao Domain formed by the Holy Dao Monument, but if the strength is weak and the Yuan Dao realm is low, they can only stay in the most marginal area, and the effect of enlightenment is naturally not good. And the Xuanyu Pavilion is going to focus on cultivating a group of geniuses, and I can take you into the Dao domain of the Holy Dao Monument at that time, and enter the area where only the Sevenfold Peak Origin Ancestor can enter, and if you participate in the Yuan Dao there, the effect will definitely be very good!"

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor also felt that Ye Tian had great potential, so he cultivated like this.

As for the other Dao Ancestors of Xuanyu Pavilion, they don't have such treatment!

"Thank you, Lord Xuanhuang Pavilion!"

Ye Tian was also overjoyed.

If he could get closer to the Holy Dao Monument, with his potential comprehension, the Endless Yuan Dao would definitely be able to easily comprehend the level above the Xiaocheng realm!

This is definitely a great opportunity for him, saving him a long time of penance, and if he is lucky, he may be able to approach the Dacheng realm and even directly comprehend the endless yuan path of the Dacheng realm.

Of course, he didn't know the effect of the Holy Dao Monument, and it was only speculation at the moment.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went back and silently waited for the birth of the Holy Dao Monument.

And during this period of time, there was an eightfold ancestor in the Hanhai District Boundary, some of which were the Eightfold Ancestors who had gone out in the past in the Hanhai District Boundary, and more of them were eightfold ancestors from other regional boundaries.

All of a sudden, many big forces will let their members keep a low profile, or even retreat, and don't run around, so as not to offend a certain Yae Ancestor.
